name: apigopro/slim-database
description: Lazy PDO database connection management for Slim Framework 4, with dual-credential (auth/app) support and PostgreSQL, MySQL, and Oracle drivers.

suggest.ext-pdo_oci: Required to use AuthDatabaseConnection/AppDatabaseConnection against Oracle. See README for Oracle Instant Client setup — this is not installable via a simple apt/pecl one-liner.
suggest.vlucas/phpdotenv: Needed if DatabaseConfiguration reads from a .env file rather than real process environment variables.
suggest.php-di/php-di: Recommended for wiring AuthDatabaseConnection/AppDatabaseConnection/CloseDatabaseConnectionsMiddleware as container-managed services.
